description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly blue and black color scheme. The front panel displays a large screen area above a control panel equipped with multiple red joysticks and buttons, suitable for multiplayer gameplay. The marquee at the top reads 'GALAXY FORCE' in bold white letters, flanked by pixelated spaceship graphics, reinforcing a retro sci-fi theme. The side panels are decorated with vibrant pixel art, including red and blue spaceships and star-like dots, evoking the aesthetics of vintage arcade shooters. The back panel is plain blue, bordered by dark trim, and lacks any visible access doors or vents. The cabinet appears to be constructed from painted wood or MDF with plastic and metal components for the controls and trim.
description: A retro upright arcade game cabinet with blue and black panels, pixel art spaceship graphics, and a 'GALAXY FORCE' marquee. The control panel features multiple red joysticks and buttons for multiplayer play.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'GALAXY FORCE' marquee, large screen, and a control panel with red joysticks and buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting pixel art graphics of spaceships and stars on a black background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain blue panel with dark trim and no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view with similar pixel art spaceship graphics as the left side, emphasizing the retro theme.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Three red joysticks and multiple red buttons arranged in a row, suitable for multiplayer use, with a black panel featuring pixel art graphics.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'GALAXY FORCE' in bold white text on a black background with blue and white pixel art spaceships, matching the sci-fi arcade theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large pixel art graphics of red and blue spaceships and star-like dots on a black background, evoking a retro space shooter theme.
